summary: Regression + new feature testing of 3 additions (album detail view, swipe-to-delete emails, animated scan overlay). Backend: 17/17 pytest tests PASS, including 4 new tests for /api/photos/demo-scan and /api/photos/by-category/{category}. Frontend (mobile viewport 390x844): scan overlay animates with rotating steps ('Reading EXIF metadata' -> ... -> 'Clustering duplicates') and progress bar; demo-scan produces 3 groups (1 EXACT DUPLICATE selfies + 2 SIMILAR food/documents) with 7 photos loaded. Albums tab lists 5 albums (Other, Food, Documents, Selfies, Landscapes). Tapping Selfies navigates to /album/selfie showing 'SMART ALBUM / Selfies' header + back button + pill '2' + 2 selfie tiles. Food album shows 2 Unsplash food photos. Back button returns to Albums. Emails: 18 rows, junk=16, single tap toggles selection + FAB appears; swipe-to-delete removes row (demo-0 gone, 17 rows remain) and persists via /api/emails/delete. All 3 new features fully functional.

issues: Persistent console warnings (already in iter1): 'shadow* style props deprecated', 'props.pointerEvents deprecated', 'useNativeDriver not supported on web' (expected - web fallback to JS animation, doesn't affect iOS).

action_items: (Optional polish) Clean residual Other album: /api/photos/albums returns an 'Other' bucket with 4 TEST_* docs left by backend tests (test_photos_analyze + batch-analyze). Not a bug but inflates albums grid during manual QA. Remove via: db.photo_analyses.deleteMany({photo_id:{$regex:/^TEST_/}}).

(Carry-over from iter1) EMERGENT_LLM_KEY budget still exceeded per backend logs; real photo upload+analyze via /api/photos/analyze falls back to category='other' with empty features. Demo-scan path unaffected and used by the 3 new features.
(Carry-over from iter1) Onboarding Next button + Alert.alert multi-button confirmation remain RN-web-only limitations.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py /api/photos/by-category/{category} correctly excludes _id via projection {'_id': 0} and enriches with demo URL map - good.
demo-scan upserts analyses into photo_analyses collection - correct approach so Smart Albums + album detail share the same source of truth.

ScanOverlay in photos.tsx: setStep cycles through 6 SCAN_STEPS at 700ms intervals (~4.2s) while tryDemo enforces min 3500ms, so user sees at least 5 steps. useNativeDriver:true on pulse will fallback to JS on web but native iOS will be smooth.
album/[category].tsx uses useLocalSearchParams and router.back() correctly; dynamic route registered in _layout.tsx.

emails.tsx Swipeable from react-native-gesture-handler wraps row; onSwipeableOpen triggers apiPost /api/emails/delete and optimistically removes from local state - good. Root GestureHandlerRootView present in _layout.tsx.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (added 4 new tests: test_photos_demo_scan, test_photos_by_category_selfie, test_photos_by_category_food, test_photos_by_category_nonexistent)
seed_data_creation: demo-scan test seeds 7 DEMO_PHOTOS into photo_analyses (demo-food-1/2, demo-dup-1/2, demo-landscape, demo-doc-1/2). Previous TEST_* docs from iter1 still present contributing to 'Other' album count (4).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features PASS. Backend has 17 pytest cases covering every endpoint incl. new ones. For frontend E2E, use tab links a[href*='photos'|'albums'|'emails'], demo-scan via [data-testid=photos-demo-btn], scan overlay step text at [data-testid=scan-step], album detail navigation via [data-testid=album-<category>] -> [data-testid=album-back-btn], email swipe-to-delete via mouse drag from right edge of [data-testid=email-row-<id>]. Clean Other album with db.photo_analyses.deleteMany({photo_id:{$regex:/^TEST_/}}) if testing from scratch.
rca_of_issue: N/A - no regressions. All 3 new features behave exactly per spec.
